steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the term the passage uses for someone who professionally evaluates books. The passage defines "literary critics" in parentheses as "people whose job it is to evaluate books." The answer comes directly from the text.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'A book publisher': Publishers produce and release books — they do not evaluate them professionally. ✗
  • Choice B — 'A literary critic': The passage explicitly defines literary critics as people whose job it is to evaluate books. ✓
  • Choice C — 'A bookseller': Booksellers sell books — not the same as evaluating them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'An author': Authors write books — they are not described as professional evaluators. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
